purpose_context: This mission completes the visible polish work needed before the design system can be promoted to a 1.0 publish and consumed by an external docsite. It fills missing Storybook stories and components identified in post-review feedback, eliminates remaining hardcoded color and opacity values from shipped CSS, makes the nav-pill drawer pattern self-contained for downstream consumers, and introduces a shared brand theme source plus CI enforcement for architecture diagrams. It is the prerequisite catalog-completeness pass that unblocks the docsite pilot (epic #17) and any 1.0 publish to npm.
purpose_tldr: Close catalog gaps, token-compliance debt, and diagram branding to reach 1.0-ready state.
